svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="ZPDcdjhmz4YBih699H0e"> <mxGraphModel dx="3433" dy="1927" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "sequenceDiagram
 participant Handler as StoreTransferenciaHandler
 participant Aggregate as Transferencia
 participant Repo as EloquentTransferenciaRepository
 participant EventBus as LaravelEventBus
 participant TransH as ApplyTransactionEffectForCuentaWhenTransferenciaWasCreatedEventHandler
 participant CuentaRepo as EloquentCuentaRepository

 Handler->>Aggregate: Transferencia::create(id, cuenta_origen, cuenta_destino, monto, fecha)
 Aggregate->>Aggregate: validateData(monto, fecha, descripcion)
 Note over Aggregate: monto > 0, fecha <= hoy, descripcion <= 255 chars
 Aggregate->>Aggregate: recordThat(new TransferenciaCreated($this))
 Aggregate-->>Handler: $transferencia

 Handler->>Repo: store($transferencia)
 Repo->>Repo: model->create($transferencia->toPrimitive())
 Repo->>EventBus: publishMany($transferencia->releaseEvents())
 Note over EventBus: [TransferenciaCreated]
 EventBus->>TransH: TransferenciaCreated
 TransH->>CuentaRepo: findById(cuenta_origen_id)
 TransH->>CuentaRepo: findById(cuenta_destino_id)
 Note over TransH: Debita cuenta_origen, acredita cuenta_destino
 TransH->>CuentaRepo: update(cuentaOrigen)
 TransH->>CuentaRepo: update(cuentaDestino)",
 "config": null
